title: Cory Decarbonisation: decision on an application for development consent under the Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by Cory Environmental Holdings Limited for the construction, operation, maintenance and decommissioning of a post-combustion CCF, including up to two carbon capture plants and a proposed new jetty, extending into the River Thames to facilitate the onward transfer of captured carbon dioxide.  Date  5 November 2025  Company / Location   Cory Environmental Holdings LimitedFloor 510 Dominion StreetLondonEC2M 2EF   "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
